rows.label: Gate 2 prompt inventory deltas are re-bound after Reading and Conversation prompt rewrites
ReadNeedComprehensionSynthesis benchmark deltas bind prompt revisions to typed Need outputs
ReadFitsFindingSynthesis benchmark deltas bind many-candidate search, embeddings, and AssetPack preview metadata
Conversation, tool-definition, MCP API, ChatGPT App, and Terminal prompt rewrites bind to benchmark metadata
Prompt registry lineage and version metadata are projected as ids, roots, counts, and schema names
PTRR steps, Failsafe sequences, ThricifiedGeneration calls, raw-output roots, and parsed outputs remain traceable
Rich execution-log streams expose prompt and result posture as source-safe metadata for live operator inspection
Repair hooks and parsed output projections remain debuggable without leaking source, prompts, responses, or settlement payloads
Gate 8 tests, scripts, docs, generated artifact, package exports, and workflows close benchmark telemetry integration
